candidates.title: Make autonomous next-best-task scoring deterministic and repo-owned
candidates.productReason: The product cannot improve autonomously if task selection stays subjective.

candidates.title: Promote the YepCode task orchestrator from local dry-run to scheduled dry-run reports
candidates.productReason: Founder input and repo gaps need a recurring intake loop before live writeback is safe.

candidates.title: Lock Notion task database identity before any autonomous live writeback
candidates.productReason: Notion should reflect execution truth without risking strategic record drift.

candidates.title: Make local self-review and CodeRabbit fallback explicit in the executor loop
candidates.productReason: Autonomy needs review evidence, and CodeRabbit can be rate-limited or unavailable.

candidates.title: Tie truth freshness failures to product impact and next task generation
candidates.productReason: Trust-critical stale data should automatically become actionable product work.

candidates.title: Select the next mobile result-flow polish task from live screen evidence
candidates.productReason: Market-grade quality depends on the result flow feeling clear, premium, and trustworthy on mobile.

candidates.title: Close CTA instrumentation gaps before optimizing conversion
candidates.productReason: The system should not optimize conversion without reliable event evidence.

candidates.title: Standardize founder reports across autonomous runs
candidates.productReason: Autonomous work needs a consistent, low-noise executive summary.

candidates.title: Run autonomous OS verification in GitHub Actions
candidates.productReason: Merge-ready autonomy requires checks that run outside the local machine.

candidates.title: Define branch, PR, and cleanup policy for autonomous executor runs
candidates.productReason: Autonomous code edits need predictable branch names, PR evidence, and cleanup behavior.
